description: Composition:Blue round neck, half sleeve t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWash Care:1.Light machine wash2.Do not scrub, bleach or dry clean3.Dry and warm iron on reverseFitting:Regular FitLive World Great-lee! That's what the t-shirt says. If you are at one with the world and have already found enough reason to chill out amid the chaos of this mad mad world, then this is just the right T-shirt for you. Briming with oodles of attitude, it looks great with denims and cargos.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
